findings.evidence: `rg -n "t - 1|ordinary 2-rank can drop" roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/Multiquadratic/README.md` hits lines 127-130: the formula is about the narrow class group, and the ordinary 2-rank can drop; the PR docstring at lines 73-75 says `This is the quantity the genus-field theorems express as t - 1`.
findings.fix: Qualify the sentence to the imaginary/narrow setting, or remove the `t - 1` claim from this ordinary class-group definition.
findings.issue: The docstring for `TauCeti.ClassGroup.twoRank` says this ordinary class-group invariant is what genus-field theorems express as `t - 1`, but the roadmap says the `t - 1` formula is for the narrow class group and can fail for real fields.

summary: The new files have module docstrings and most public declarations are documented, but one public docstring overstates the genus-theory formula for the ordinary class group.
